commands.name: convert
commands.description: Converts traces log files (.adtx) to another format.

options.name: --format
options.description: The output format. Defaults to 'PerfettoProtobuf'. [default: PerfettoProtobuf]

options.name: --include-ids
options.description: If specified, includes trace and span ids. Valid only for Perfetto Protobuf format. [default: False]

arguments.name: in
arguments.description: Path to the input traces log file (.adtx), to a Zip archive containing traces log files, or to a directory containing traces log files.

arguments.name: out
arguments.description: Path to the output directory receiving the converted traces files. Defaults to the input directory.
